name: abap2UI5-api
description: Generated abap2UI5 ports of the official UI5 demo kit samples.

scripts.syfixes: find . -type f -name '*.abap' -exec sed -i -e 's/ RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_sy_itab_line_not_found/ ASSERT 1 = 0/g' {} +
scripts.downport: abaplint --fix .github/abaplint/abap_702.jsonc && npm run syfixes && cp -f .github/abaplint/abap_702.jsonc abaplint.jsonc && npm run abaplintpathfix
